member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Core.SimConnectInterface
member.summary: Core SimConnect interface implementation with dynamic loading and SimVar translation. Works with both MSFS2024 and P3D.

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Core.SimConnectInterface.RegisteredDefinition
member.summary: Internal tracking of a registered data definition

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Interfaces.ISimInterface.RequestData(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.UpdatePeriod)
member.summary: Request data on the user's aircraft

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Interfaces.ISimInterface.SetData(System.UInt32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimValue})
member.summary: Set data on the user's aircraft

member.name: E:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Interfaces.ISimInterface.DataReceived
member.summary: Raised when simulation data is received

member.name: E:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Interfaces.ISimInterface.ExceptionReceived
member.summary: Raised when a SimConnect exception occurs

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Loader.SimConnectDelegates
member.summary: Unmanaged function pointer delegate types matching SimConnect API signatures

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Loader.SimConnectDynamicLoader
member.summary: Dynamically loads SimConnect.dll at runtime, supporting both MSFS2024 and Prepar3D without compile-time binding.

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Loader.SimConnectDynamicLoader.IsLoaded
member.summary: Whether a DLL is currently loaded

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Loader.SimConnectDynamicLoader.Load
member.summary: Auto-detect and load SimConnect from any available simulator. Tries MSFS2024 first, then P3D.

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Loader.SimConnectDynamicLoader.Load(SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimPlatform)
member.summary: Load SimConnect for a specific simulator platform

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Loader.SimConnectDynamicLoader.LoadFromPath(System.String,SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimPlatform)
member.summary: Load from an explicit file path

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Loader.SimConnectDynamicLoader.Unload
member.summary: Unload the currently loaded SimConnect DLL

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Loader.Win32Native
member.summary: Win32 P/Invoke declarations for dynamic DLL loading

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.DataDefinition
member.summary: A group of simulation variables to be requested together

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.DataDefinition.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for this definition group

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.DataDefinition.Variables
member.summary: The variables in this definition group

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.DataDefinition.GetTotalByteSize
member.summary: Calculate total byte size of all variables

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.DataDefinition.GetFieldOffsets
member.summary: Get byte offsets for each variable within the data block

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimConnectConstants
member.summary: SimConnect protocol constants shared across platforms

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimDataReceivedEventArgs
member.summary: Event args for simulation data updates

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimDataReceivedEventArgs.RequestId
member.summary: Request ID that triggered this data

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimDataReceivedEventArgs.GetValue(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific value by variable name, or default

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.ConnectionStateChangedEventArgs
member.summary: Event args for connection state transitions

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimValue
member.summary: Represents a simulation variable value with type information. Immutable value type for thread safety.

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimValue.Type
member.summary: The data type of this value

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimValue.HasValue
member.summary: Whether this value has been set

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimValue.TryGetDouble(System.Double@)
member.summary: Try to get as double without exceptions

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimValue.TryGetInt(System.Int32@)
member.summary: Try to get as int without exceptions

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimVarDefinition
member.summary: Defines a single simulation variable to be requested

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimVarDefinition.Epsilon
member.summary: Epsilon value for change detection (0 = report all changes)

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimVarDefinition.GetByteSize
member.summary: Get the byte size of this variable's data type

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectingSimInterface
member.summary: Wraps SimConnectInterface with automatic reconnection, state persistence across reconnections, and heartbeat monitoring.

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectingSimInterface.PersistentRequest
member.summary: A data request that persists across reconnections

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectingSimInterface.StopAsync
member.summary: Stop the background worker and disconnect

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectingSimInterface.RegisterDataDefinition(SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.DataDefinition)
member.summary: Register a data definition (persisted across reconnections)

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectingSimInterface.RequestData(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.UpdatePeriod)
member.summary: Request data (periodic requests persisted across reconnections)

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectingSimInterface.SendEvent(System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Send a simulator event (only when connected)

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectingSimInterface.SetData(System.UInt32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,SimConnectCrossPlatform.Models.SimValue})
member.summary: Set data on the simulation (only when connected)

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectingSimInterface.ResetRetryCount
member.summary: Reset retry counter (useful for manual reconnect triggers)

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectionConfig.HeartbeatTimeout
member.summary: Time without data before considering connection lost (default: 15s)

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectionConfig.EnableJitter
member.summary: Add random jitter to backoff delays (default: true)

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Reconnection.ReconnectionConfig.JitterFraction
member.summary: Jitter range as fraction of delay (default: 0.2 = ±20%)

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Translation.SimVarTranslator
member.summary: Translates canonical SimVar names to platform-specific equivalents. Most variables are identical across platforms (passthrough). Only variables that differ are explicitly mapped.

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Translation.SimVarTranslator.Translate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Translate a canonical variable name to the current platform

member.name: M:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Translation.SimVarTranslator.IsSupported(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a canonical variable name is supported on the current platform

member.name: T:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Translation.TranslatedVar
member.summary: Result of translating a canonical SimVar name for a platform

member.name: P:SimConnectCrossPlatform.Translation.TranslatedVar.IsSupported
member.summary: Whether this variable is supported on the platform
